subtitle: Review as-built architecture with evidence strength, inferred seams, and requirement pressure left explicit.

sections.title: Major Architecture Claims and Evidence
sections.label: Architecture
sections.why: Lead with the strongest as-built architecture claims before weaker inference.

sections.title: Runtime, Error, and Resource-Ownership Seams
sections.label: Runtime Seams
sections.why: Show the seams most likely to affect future changes.

sections.title: Findings that Pressure Requirement Reconciliation
sections.label: Reconciliation
sections.why: Show design findings that exceed current requirements.

sections.title: Decisions Required for Approval
sections.label: Decision Gate
sections.why: State what the reviewer is accepting as the as-built technical baseline.

sections.title: Traceability Map
sections.label: Evidence
sections.why: Tie derived design claims to exact evidence.

sections.title: Validator Status
sections.label: Validation
sections.why: Show validation status for the derived design and approval view.

sections.title: Downstream Impact if Approved
sections.label: Impact
sections.why: Clarify what follow-on changes may now treat as architecture reality.

glance_cards.label: Runtime seams
glance_cards.hint: Runtime or ownership seams shaping changes.

glance_cards.label: Reconciliation
glance_cards.hint: Findings likely to force requirement updates.

glance_cards.label: Evidence claims
glance_cards.hint: Claims backed by exact evidence quotes.
